} @if (isLoaded) {

@if (element.status == 'accepted') { {{util.appTranslate('accepted')}} ({{element.withdrawalMethodDetail.displayName}}) } @if (element.status == 'rejected') { {{util.appTranslate('rejected')}} ({{element.withdrawalMethodDetail.displayName}}) } @if (element.status == 'created') { {{util.appTranslate('pending')}} ({{element.withdrawalMethodDetail.displayName}}) }

{{util.priceFormat(element.amount)}}
